payload.title: Animate programmatic card moves across columns
payload.description: When a card's status changes from a source other than the local drag-and-drop (another agent over MCP, CLI invocation, or SSE-driven realtime update), animate it flying from its old column to its new column instead of snapping. Should feel tactile and delightful — especially eye-catching on a secondary monitor where the board is just being watched. Considerations: use FLIP (First-Last-Invert-Play) or Web Animations API; respect prefers-reduced-motion; the animation should layer cleanly over normal drag interactions without making local drops feel laggy.
